mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO course_daily_statistics ( course_id, stat_date, view_count, study_count, study_time, new_student_count, comment_count, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.courseId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.studyCount}, #{item.studyTime}, #{item.newStudentCount}, #{item.commentCount}, NOW() )

update.foreach: UPDATE course_daily_statistics SET view_count = #{item.viewCount}, study_count = #{item.studyCount}, study_time = #{item.studyTime}, new_student_count = #{item.newStudentCount}, comment_count = #{item.commentCount} WHERE course_id = #{item.courseId} AND stat_date = #{item.statDate}
